examples: This little man, who is both naive and shrewd, has a("chaplinesque" side to him.
Liu Ye's love for the tragic-comic is evident in his portrait of the child-sailor, who is indeed in many ways Chaplinesque.
Thee COMEDY: These always charming, sometimes shiftless, talented men imbue their physical talent with a good dose of Chaplinesque humor.
Waits took to the stage dressed in a Chaplinesque suit, delivering his set from a slightly raised platform that gave up a cloud of dust each time he bashed his feet into it.
